WITN09900100
WITN09900100

Witness Name: Angela Van Den Bogerd

Statement No: WITN09900100

Dated: 20 March 2024

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF ANGELA VAN DEN BOGERD

I, Angela Van Den Bogerd, will say as follows:

1. I make this statement in response to a Request for Information pursuant to Rule 9 of the Inquiry Rules 2006, regarding matters within Phases 5 and 6 of the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry, dated 29 January 2024.

2. As laid out below, I was closely involved with the Sub-Postmasters ("SPM") claims, including acting as a witness in the Common Issues Trial and Horizon Issues Trial. I have followed the Inquiry and what has come out of it has horrified me. Had I known that the Horizon IT system was flawed on implementation, my approach would have been different throughout my time with Post Office Limited ("POL"). I am in complete support of full compensation for all SPM's who were affected by Horizon IT issues and

Page 1 of 132
